risk_rules.reason: Deleting the production database creates catastrophic business failure.
Public exposure can lead to data leakage or system takeover.
Granting admin rights can create privilege escalation paths.
GitHub compromise can alter source code, access CI pipelines, expose secrets, and reach production infrastructure.
Direct write access to GitHub can trigger deployment pipelines and production changes.
Reading a development database has low operational risk.
Reading development logs has low operational risk.
